value.description: You demonstrate a workflow once on your Mac and Codex records your actions, then packages them into a named, reusable "skill" — capturing steps, required inputs, and success criteria. To reuse it, start a new thread in the Codex app and ask Codex to run the skill, supplying any values that differ this time; Codex executes it using Computer Use, browser actions, or plugins.
value.label: Record & Replay
